regions.name: Northwest
regions.bestTimeToVisit: September to November offers cool weather and clear skies for trekking and exploring mountain villages.

regions.name: Northeast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: October to April provides pleasant weather for visiting Ha Long Bay and exploring limestone karsts.

regions.name: Red River Delta
regions.bestTimeToVisit: October to April is ideal with cooler temperatures and lower humidity for exploring the capital and delta.

regions.name: North Central Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to September offers warm weather and calm seas for beach activities and water sports.

regions.name: Central Highlands
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to April provides cool, dry weather perfect for coffee plantations and outdoor activities.

regions.name: South Central Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: January to September features sunny skies and calm seas ideal for beach holidays and diving.

regions.name: Mekong Delta
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to January offers dry weather and lower water levels for exploring floating markets and waterways.

regions.name: Southeast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to April offers cooler, drier weather for exploring the bustling metropolis and nearby attractions.
